name: Summer Squash and Corn Chowder
recipeIngredient: 2 small smoked trout fillets, skinned and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. In a soup pot over medium heat, fry bacon until crisp. Remove from pan and blot bacon dry.
2. Over medium heat, using bacon drippings, saute onions and red pepper until tender. Add corn, water, milk, thyme, and hot pepper sauce. Simmer uncovered over medium-low heat for 10 minutes or until corn is tender.
3. Stir in zucchini and squash and continue simmering 20 minutes or until veggies are soft.
4. Stir in cream, trout, and Worcestershire sauce and heat through.
5. Ladle into serving bowls, season with salt and pepper, and top with crumbled bacon.
